name: What if my **New York firm** gets some AI mentions but wrong practice area?
description: **Tailor bios/PR for exact practices; audit now.**[2]

mainEntity.name: What if my **New York firm** gets some AI mentions but wrong practice area?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Tailor bios/PR for exact practices; audit now.**[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Refine bios and PR to match exact expertise patterns AI seeks.** Misalignments stem from inconsistent data.[2] Tailor for specificity.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Practice-specific content
- Cross-source consistency
- Structured labels
- Peer validations by area

**Audit queries, update profiles, and reinforce via PR.** Monitor corrections.[3] **Precision fixes mismatches quickly.**
